item.title: AFK 0.4.0
item.description:
Transcriptions that survive, and a language picker

  • File transcriptions keep running when you switch tabs or close the window — with a real progress bar. Finished results stick around for an hour (even across a relaunch) so you can't lose one by clicking away.
  • Save to keep — saving a transcript records it in History's new Files tab (where it went, how long the audio was, how fast it transcribed). AFK never stores the transcript text itself; unsaved results expire after an hour.
  • Default language — pick your dictation language in Settings (English by default). This also fixes the rare case where English speech came out in Cyrillic. Applies instantly, no relaunch.
  • CLI: afk transcribe file.mp3 --lang en.
  • "Delete all history" now asks first — and never cancels a transcription in progress.

item.title: AFK 0.3.0
item.description:
Word-level timestamps + shareable scoreboard

  • Timestamps view on file transcripts — toggle to see every segment with mm:ss times.
  • Export as .srt or .json from the Save menu (subtitles, video editing, or your own scripts). Also in the CLI: afk transcribe file --srt | --json.
  • Share card — one click on Home renders your dictation scoreboard (words, time saved, WPM, rank) as an image, saved to Downloads and copied to the clipboard.
